public_map_view.structure: Full-screen map background with floating UI islands.

components.name: Search Bar
components.style: Glassmorphism or Solid White pill shape, high shadow

components.name: Nearest Dustbin Card
components.style: Swipeable drawer on mobile, floating card on desktop

components.name: Admin Login Button
components.style: Subtle ghost button or icon only

admin_dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation (collapsible on mobile) + Main Content Area.
admin_dashboard.style: Clean, white cards on soft gray background. No heavy gradients.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4A7C59] hover:bg-[#3A6346] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-[#4A7C59] hover:bg-[#4A7C59]/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:border-[#4A7C59]/30 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-gray-50 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-[#4A7C59] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4A7C59]/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 transition-all

map_markers.dustbin: Custom SVG icon (Green bin) with drop shadow

images.description: Green trash can in park - Use for Login Page background or About section
Abstract water ripple - Use for subtle card backgrounds or decorative elements

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons for a softer look.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for floating map controls.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility (WCAG AA).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install necessary dependencies: leaflet, react-leaflet, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Setup Tailwind theme colors in tailwind.config.js based on the design system.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the Map component using React Leaflet. Ensure it takes full height.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the floating UI components (Search, Nearest Bin) using the glassmorphism style.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the Admin Dashboard with a clean sidebar layout.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Integrate the 'Green trash can' image as a background for the Admin Login page.
